cards: Personalized Nutrition Plan with Calorie & Macro Calculation
cards_txt: Estimated body fat percentage, muscle mass, and fat mass based on anthropometric measurements
Personalized calorie and macronutrient recommendations tailored to your goal
Projected weight change based on your selected goal and recommended calorie intake
Additional nutrition guidance and adjustments to help you achieve lasting results

tariff_1.title: BodyFlow Personal Report
tariff_1.description: Your personalized PDF report will be sent to your email after payment

tariff_content.title: What the report includes
tariff_content.descr_1: Body mass index, body fat percentage, body composition, and recommended daily water intake.
tariff_content.descr_2: Calculation of metabolic age and risk level, as well as basal metabolic rate, daily calorie needs, and individual macronutrient balance based on your activity level and goal.
tariff_content.descr_3: A ready-to-use 5-day meal plan generated according to your calculated indicators and goal.
tariff_content.descr_4: A forecast of weight change dynamics and personalized recommendations to achieve your goal.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.item_1_q: When will I receive my report?
faq.item_1_a: The PDF report is sent automatically to your email immediately after successful payment. If you do not see the email within a few minutes, please check your Spam folder or contact support.
faq.item_2_a: Yes. Payments are processed through a secure payment system. BodyFlow does not store your bank card details.
faq.item_3_a: Since the report is generated individually based on your data and delivered immediately after payment, refunds are only possible in case of a technical error or if the report was not delivered. If you experience any issues, please contact us and we will be happy to assist you.
faq.item_4_q: What if I entered incorrect information?
faq.item_4_a: If you notice an error in the entered data before payment, simply go back and perform a new calculation. If the mistake is discovered after payment, please contact support and we will review the situation.
faq.item_5_a: Your data is used solely to generate your personalized report and is not shared with third parties.
faq.item_6_q: Is this plan suitable for people with medical conditions?
faq.item_6_a: The service provides informational recommendations. If you have chronic health conditions or medical restrictions, we recommend consulting a healthcare professional.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy (hereinafter referred to as the "Policy") defines the procedures for the collection, use, storage, and protection of personal data of users of the BodyFlow service (https://bodyflow.com.ua), operated by sole proprietor Serhii Cherneha (hereinafter referred to as "BodyFlow", "Service" or the "Website"). By using the Website and its functionality, including calculators, meal plan generation, personal account features, and paid digital products, you agree to the terms of this Policy.
privacy.s1_1_li1: Name and email address during registration or order placement.
privacy.s1_1_li2: Data entered into calculators and website forms (age, height, weight, activity level, nutrition goals, and other parameters).
privacy.s1_1_li3: Information stored in your personal account (calculations, menus, settings, order history).
privacy.s1_1_li4: Data required to generate a personal PDF report, including indicators used to calculate BMI, body composition, calories and macronutrients, water intake, metabolic age, metabolic risk, weight forecast, and a personalized meal plan.
privacy.s1_2_li1: IP address, device type, and browser type.
privacy.s1_2_li3: Pages of the website you visit and the time spent on the website.
privacy.s2_1_li1: Ensuring the proper operation of the service.
privacy.s2_1_li2: Calculating indicators and generating personalized nutrition recommendations.
privacy.s2_1_li3: Creating and delivering a personal PDF report.
privacy.s2_1_li4: Storing data in the user's personal account.
privacy.s2_1_li5: Analyzing website usage and improving its functionality.
privacy.s2_1_li6: Processing orders, payments, and providing access to purchased digital products.
privacy.s3_text: When ordering paid services, including the purchase of a personal PDF report, payment data is processed through third-party payment services.
privacy.s3_li1: BodyFlow does not store or process full bank card details, including card number, CVV/CVC code, and expiration date.
privacy.s3_li2: All payment data is processed directly by payment providers in accordance with their rules and privacy policies.
privacy.s3_li3: We may receive limited payment-related information, such as payment status, amount, currency, transaction identifier, and the buyer's email address, if necessary to fulfill the order.
privacy.s4_text: To generate a personal report, BodyFlow processes the data you provide through the website regarding body parameters, lifestyle, activity level, goals, and other indicators.
privacy.s4_li1: This data is used solely for calculating indicators, generating meal plans, providing recommendations, and creating the PDF report.
privacy.s4_li2: The results are generated automatically based on the data you provide and the service's internal algorithms.
privacy.s4_li3: Such calculations are for informational purposes only and do not constitute a medical opinion, diagnosis, or treatment.
privacy.s5_li1: Your consent to the processing of personal data when using the website and its functionality.
privacy.s5_li2: The necessity to perform a contract or provide a service, including when ordering and paying for a personal PDF report.
privacy.s5_li3: Our legitimate interest in ensuring the security, stable operation, and development of the service.
privacy.s6_1_text: The BodyFlow website uses cookies to ensure website functionality, analyze traffic, save user preferences, and display advertising.
privacy.s6_2_text: We may use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google and its partners may use cookies to show ads based on your previous visits to this and other websites.
privacy.s6_2_li1: Google uses advertising cookies to display personalized ads.
privacy.s6_2_li2: Users can disable personalized advertising in Google's ad settings (https://adssettings.google.com).
privacy.s6_2_li3: Other advertising providers may also use cookies.
privacy.s6_3_text: You can change your cookie settings in your browser; however, this may affect the operation of certain website features.
privacy.s7_title: 7. Transfer of data to third parties
privacy.s7_1_text: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Data may only be transferred in cases necessary for the operation of the service:
privacy.s7_1_li1: To hosting providers, technical contractors, and infrastructure services.
privacy.s7_1_li2: To payment services for processing order payments.
privacy.s7_1_li3: To web analytics and advertising services (for example, Google Analytics and Google AdSense).
privacy.s7_1_li4: In cases expressly provided for by the laws of Ukraine.
privacy.s8_1_text: We apply the necessary technical and organizational measures to protect data, including the use of HTTPS connections, restricted access to information, and basic security measures to protect user accounts and orders.
privacy.s8_2_text: Data is stored for the duration of the account's existence or until it is deleted by the user. Data related to purchased reports and payments may be stored longer if necessary for order fulfillment, access to purchase history, accounting, or compliance with legal requirements.
privacy.s9_li1: To obtain information about your personal data.
privacy.s9_li2: To request correction, updating, or deletion of your data.
privacy.s9_li3: To withdraw consent to data processing in cases where processing is based on consent.
privacy.s9_li4: To delete your account or contact us regarding data deletion, unless this conflicts with our legal obligations to retain such data.
privacy.s10_text: The BodyFlow service, all calculations, recommendations, meal plans, and personal PDF reports are provided for informational purposes only. They do not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, treatment, or an individual doctor's prescription and do not replace consultation with a qualified medical professional or dietitian.
privacy.s11_text: Certain technical services used to operate BodyFlow, including hosting, analytics, data storage, or payment infrastructure, may process data on servers located outside Ukraine. By using the website, you agree to such transfer of data to the extent necessary for the operation of the service.
privacy.s12_text: We may update this Privacy Policy. The updated version becomes effective from the moment it is published on the website unless otherwise stated additionally.
privacy.s13_text: If you have any questions regarding the processing of personal data, access, correction, or deletion of information, you may contact us:

meta.title: BMI Calculator Online – Body Mass Index and Healthy Weight
meta.description: Calculate your Body Mass Index (BMI) online. Find out whether your weight is within the normal range and get nutrition and calorie recommendations.

imt_page.intro_p1: Body Mass Index (BMI) is a simple and quick way to evaluate the relationship between weight and height and determine whether a person falls within a healthy range. With the online BMI calculator, you can get your result in seconds and gain a general understanding of your body weight status.
imt_page.intro_p2: Calculating BMI is the first step toward weight control, weight loss, or muscle gain. However, it is important to understand that BMI alone does not provide a complete picture of your health — it is only a starting point.

what.title: What Is Body Mass Index
what.p1: Body Mass Index is a numerical value calculated based on a person’s weight and height. It is widely used worldwide for the preliminary assessment of underweight, normal weight, or overweight status.
what.list_2: identify potential risks of excess weight
what.list_3: understand whether dietary adjustments are needed
what.note: BMI does not take body composition into account (body fat percentage, muscle mass, body type), so the result should be interpreted together with other health indicators.

formula.title: BMI Formula
formula.p1: Body Mass Index is calculated using the formula:
formula.p3: For example: if your weight is 70 kg and your height is 1.75 m: 70 / (1.75 × 1.75) = 22.9
formula.p4: The resulting value is compared with standard BMI ranges. This formula is used by most online BMI calculators.

table.title: BMI Classification Table
table.p1: According to WHO recommendations, BMI values are interpreted as follows:
table.note: These values are general guidelines and apply to most adults.

result.title: What Your Result Means
result.p1: If your BMI falls within the normal range, it means that your weight-to-height ratio is balanced.
result.p2: If your result is above or below the normal range, it may indicate the need to:
result.list_3: change your level of physical activity
result.note: However, BMI alone does not answer how many calories you need daily or how to properly structure your nutrition plan.

limits.title: Why BMI Alone Is Not Enough
limits.p1: Body Mass Index does not consider:
limits.note: For example, an athlete with high muscle mass may have a BMI above the normal range while having low body fat. That is why calculating daily calorie needs and macronutrient balance is essential for a more accurate assessment.

next.title: How to Move from BMI to a Real Nutrition Plan
next.p1: After determining your BMI, the next logical step is calculating your daily calorie needs.
next.p3: you can determine your individual calorie target and optimal balance of protein, fats, and carbohydrates.
next.p4: The BodyFlow service allows you to:
next.p6: define your goal (weight loss, maintenance, muscle gain)
next.p8: This way, you move from a simple BMI number to a structured and balanced nutrition plan.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.item_1_q: What is BMI in simple terms?
faq.item_1_a: It is an indicator that helps determine whether a person’s weight matches their height.
faq.item_2_a: BMI is an approximate indicator and does not account for body composition.
faq.item_3_a: For people with high muscle mass, BMI may not be fully accurate.
faq.item_4_a: For adults, a BMI between 18.5 and 24.9 is considered normal.
faq.item_5_q: Can you lose weight by focusing only on BMI?
faq.item_5_a: No. Effective weight control requires managing calorie intake and macronutrient balance.

imt_page.cta: Calculate BMI & Get Your Meal Plan

meta.title: Calorie and Macro Calculator Online – Daily Intake Calculation
meta.description: Calorie and macro calculator online. Calculate your daily calorie needs, protein, fat and carb intake for weight loss, maintenance or muscle gain.

kbsu_page.intro_p1: The calorie and macro calculator helps you accurately estimate your daily calorie needs and optimal protein, fat and carbohydrate intake based on your goal. Whether you want to lose weight, maintain your current shape or gain muscle — proper calculation is the foundation of results.
kbsu_page.intro_p2: Online calorie calculation allows you to create a calorie deficit or surplus, control nutrition and build a balanced diet without extreme dieting.

what.title: What Are Calories and Macros
what.p1: Calories represent energy intake, while macros — protein, fat and carbohydrates — determine how your body uses that energy.
what.list_3: fat — hormone balance and vitamin absorption
what.note: The balance of calories and macros determines the effectiveness of weight loss, maintenance or muscle gain. To understand your starting point before calculating calories, it is recommended to determine your

formula.title: How Daily Calorie Needs Are Calculated
formula.p1: Daily calorie intake is calculated using the Mifflin–St Jeor formula, which considers weight, height, age and gender.
formula.p3: BMR is your basal metabolic rate, and TDEE is your total daily energy expenditure.
formula.p4: TDEE is used to determine whether you need a calorie deficit for weight loss or a surplus for muscle gain.

table.title: Macros for Different Goals
table.p1: Macro ratios vary depending on your goal:
table.list_1: Weight loss — 10–20% calorie deficit and higher protein intake
table.list_4: Body recomposition — controlled carbs and higher protein
table.note: Personalized calculations are always more accurate than generic recommendations.

result.title: What You Get After Calculation
result.p1: After calculation, you receive your daily calorie target and exact macro breakdown.
result.note: Without calculating calories, it is difficult to predict changes in body weight.

limits.title: Why a Calculator Alone Is Not Enough
limits.p1: A calorie calculator provides an estimate and does not account for:
limits.note: Therefore, it is important not only to know the numbers but also to apply them correctly in your diet. For a more accurate assessment of your body condition, it is recommended to additionally calculate your
limits.note_1: and consider it together with your daily calorie needs.

next.title: From Numbers to a Real Meal Plan
next.p1: After calculating your calorie needs, the next step is building a practical meal plan.
next.list_3: a balanced daily menu is created
next.p3: This makes it easier to reach your goal without restrictive dieting.
next.p6: adjust the diet to your goal
next.p8: This way you move from simple calorie numbers to a structured personal menu.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.item_1_q: How many calories do I need to lose weight?
faq.item_1_a: A calorie deficit of about 10–20% below your daily needs is typically recommended.
faq.item_2_a: Macros are calculated based on your weight, height, age, gender and activity level.
faq.item_3_q: Do I have to count calories?
faq.item_3_a: Calorie tracking significantly improves consistency and results.
faq.item_4_q: How much protein do I need daily?
faq.item_4_a: Most people benefit from 1.6–2.2 grams of protein per kilogram of body weight.

meta.title: Personalized Meal Plan Online with Calories and Macros
meta.description: Create a personalized meal plan online based on your calories, macronutrients and goal. Automatic 5-day meal plan without dieting or manual calculations.

menu_page.h1: Personalized Meal Plan Online Based on Calories and Goals
menu_page.intro_p1: A personalized meal plan online is an automatically generated nutrition plan that takes into account your daily calorie intake, macronutrient balance and chosen goal: weight loss, maintenance or muscle gain, calculated using the
menu_page.intro_p2: The BodyFlow system creates a ready-to-use 5-day meal plan based on your age, weight, height and activity level. You get a structured nutrition plan without manual calorie tracking.

what.title: What Is a Personalized Meal Plan
what.p1: A personalized meal plan is a diet created based on your individual calorie and macronutrient calculation.
what.note: Before creating a meal plan, it is recommended to determine your

formula.title: How the Automatic Meal Plan Is Generated
formula.p1: First, the system calculates your Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR) and Total Daily Energy Expenditure (TDEE).
formula.p2: TDEE adjusted to your goal = individual calorie target
formula.p3: Calories are then distributed between proteins, fats and carbohydrates.
formula.p4: Based on this data, foods are selected and a balanced meal plan is generated.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.item_1_q: Does the meal plan work for different goals?
faq.item_1_a: Yes. The nutrition plan is generated for weight loss, maintenance or muscle gain.
faq.item_2_q: How many days does the plan include?
faq.item_2_a: The system generates a ready 5-day meal plan.
faq.item_3_a: Yes, calorie calculations are based on your physical activity level.
faq.item_4_q: Do I need to track calories manually?
faq.item_4_a: No. The system automatically calculates calories and macronutrients.

pdf.title: Personal BodyFlow Report
pdf.description: Body composition analysis, metabolism insights, and goal achievement strategy
pdf.note: This report is generated automatically based on the provided data. The calculations do not constitute a medical diagnosis.
pdf.note_1: All further calculations are based on the parameters you provided.
pdf.conclusion_1: The optimal fat mass level for your age and sex is
pdf.bf_zone_low: The value is below the athletic range. A low body fat level is possible.
pdf.bf_zone_sport: The value corresponds to the athletic body composition range.
pdf.bf_zone_normal: The value corresponds to a healthy range for your age and sex.
pdf.bf_zone_excess: The value exceeds the healthy range. A gradual adjustment of body weight and lifestyle is recommended.
pdf.bf_sport_low_activity: The value falls within the athletic range. With moderate physical activity, it is important to monitor well-being and ensure adequate nutrition.
pdf.bf_sport_high_activity: The value corresponds to an athletic level of body composition and aligns with a higher level of physical activity.
pdf.bmr_descr: This is the amount of energy your body burns at rest.
pdf.water_descr: Part of your fluid intake comes from food (soups, vegetables, beverages). However, for proper metabolism, it is recommended to drink enough pure water.
pdf.meta_risk_low: Your body composition indicators correspond to a low metabolic risk.
pdf.meta_risk_normal: A moderate metabolic risk level related to fat distribution has been identified.
pdf.meta_risk_high: Indicators suggest an increased metabolic risk. Gradual weight correction is recommended.
pdf.meta_age_lower: Your metabolic age is lower than your actual age — this indicates good metabolic activity.
pdf.meta_age_higher: Your metabolic age exceeds your chronological age. Reducing body fat and increasing activity can help lower it.
pdf.menu_note: The menu is generated according to your calorie target and selected goal.
pdf.weight_note: A safe rate of weight change is 0.5–1% of body weight per week.
pdf.meta_recomend_1: Ensure protein intake of 1.6–2 g per kg of body weight to preserve muscle mass and maintain stable metabolism
pdf.meta_recomend_2: Do not reduce fats below 0.8 g per kg to support hormonal balance and nervous system function
pdf.meta_recomend_3: Follow the calculated calorie target without extreme deficits or surpluses
pdf.meta_recomend_4: Maintain hydration according to the recommended pure water intake
pdf.behavior_rmomend_1: Sleep at least 7–8 hours per day for recovery and appetite regulation
pdf.behavior_rmomend_2: Control portion sizes and avoid overeating in the evening
pdf.behavior_rmomend_3: Track your food intake for at least 2–3 weeks to build awareness
pdf.behavior_rmomend_4: Weigh yourself once a week and also monitor waist circumference
pdf.training_recommendation_1: Perform strength training at least 3 times per week to maintain muscle mass
pdf.training_recommendation_2: Strength exercises help strengthen bones and joints and prevent age-related changes
pdf.training_recommendation_4: Combine strength and cardio training for optimal body composition
pdf.strategy_recomend_1: Recalculate calories if weight changes by more than 3 kg
pdf.strategy_recomend_2: Gradually transition to maintenance after reaching your target weight
pdf.strategy_recomend_3: Repeat body composition analysis in 4–6 weeks to assess progress
pdf.strategy_recomend_4: Focus not only on weight, but also on body composition and overall well-being
